description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-drawer` (T2-06) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-drawer/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, placement (left/right/top/bottom) typed, open prop typed, size typed
2. Accessibility — `role="dialog"`, aria-modal, focus trap when open, Escape closes, focus returns to trigger on close, scroll lock on body, axe-core pass
3. Tests — open/close, all placements, focus trap, Escape key, backdrop click to close, scroll lock, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — all placements, with/without footer, nested content
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, slide-in animation, backdrop, CSS parts (panel, header, body, footer, close-btn)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable, JS behaviors for open/close

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-drawer/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-drawer — T2-06 antagonistic quality review
